name: Slava Trofimov
headline: Full-Stack AI Engineer specializing in production LLM systems, agentic architectures, and intelligent data pipelines
title: Full-Stack AI Engineer
summary: Full-Stack AI Engineer with a background in end-to-end product delivery and a current focus on production-grade LLM systems, agentic workflows, RAG, vector search, and structured-output pipelines.
bio: Slava Trofimov is a Canada-based Full-Stack AI Engineer with more than a decade of experience spanning front-end architecture, full-stack product delivery, and modern AI systems. His recent work centers on ingestion, retrieval, orchestration, and evaluation layers for enterprise AI applications. He combines a strong product engineering background with practical experience building reliable LLM-powered systems, tool-calling agents, and intelligent data pipelines for production environments.
